heading: Returns regarding payments of remuneration for services and direct sales

children.heading: Returns regarding remuneration for services
children.label: a Returns regarding remuneration for services

children.text: any service-recipient engaged in a trade or business pays in the course of such trade or business during any calendar year remuneration to any person for services performed by such person, and
the aggregate of such remuneration paid to such person during such calendar year equals or exceeds the dollar amount in effect for such calendar year under section 6041(a),

children.heading: Direct sales of $5,000 or more
children.label: b Direct sales of $5,000 or more
A
children.text: any person engaged in a trade or business in the course of such trade or business during any calendar year sells consumer products to any buyer on a buy-sell basis, a deposit-commission basis, or any similar basis which the Secretary prescribes by regulations, for resale (by the buyer or any other person) in the home or otherwise than in a permanent retail establishment, and

children.label: B
children.text: the aggregate amount of the sales to such buyer during such calendar year is $5,000 or more,

children.heading: Buy-sell basis
children.label: A Buy-sell basis
children.text: A transaction is on a buy-sell basis if the buyer performing the services is entitled to retain part or all of the difference between the price at which the buyer purchases the product and the price at which the buyer sells the product as part or all of the buyer’s remuneration for the services, and

children.heading: Deposit-commission basis
children.label: B Deposit-commission basis
children.text: A transaction is on a deposit-commission basis if the buyer performing the services is entitled to retain part or all of a purchase deposit paid by the consumer in connection with the transaction as part or all of the buyer’s remuneration for the services.

children.heading: Certain services not included
children.label: c Certain services not included
children.text: No return shall be required under subsection (a) or (b) if a statement with respect to the services is required to be furnished under section 6051, 6052, or 6053.

children.heading: Treated as persons
children.label: 1 Treated as persons
children.text: The term “person” includes any governmental unit (and any agency or instrumentality thereof).

children.label: A
children.text: subsection (a) shall be applied without regard to the trade or business requirement contained therein, and

children.label: B
children.text: any return under this section shall be made by the officer or employee having control of the payment or appropriately designated for the purpose of making such return.

children.heading: Payments to corporations by Federal executive agencies
children.label: 3 Payments to corporations by Federal executive agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any regulation prescribed by the Secretary before the date of the enactment of this paragraph, subsection (a) shall apply to remuneration paid to a corporation by any Federal executive agency (as defined in section 6050M(b)).

children.label: i
children.text: services under contracts described in section 6050M(e)(3) with respect to which the requirements of section 6050M(e)(2) are met, and

children.label: ii
children.text: such other services as the Secretary may specify in regulations prescribed after the date of the enactment of this paragraph.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required to be furnished
children.label: e Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required to be furnished

children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the person required to make such return,
in the case of subsection (a), the aggregate amount of payments to the person required to be shown on such return, and
in the case of subsection (a), the portion of payments that have been reasonably designated as cash tips and the occupation described in section 224(d)(1) of the person receiving such tips.

children.heading: Recipient to furnish name, address, and identification number; inclusion on return
children.label: f Recipient to furnish name, address, and identification number; inclusion on return

children.heading: Furnishing of information
children.label: 1 Furnishing of information
children.text: Any person with respect to whom a return or statement is required under this section to be made by another person shall furnish to such other person his name, address, and identification number at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may prescribe by regulations.

children.heading: Inclusion on return
children.label: 2 Inclusion on return
children.text: The person to whom an identification number is furnished under paragraph (1) shall include such number on any return which such person is required to file under this section and to which such identification number relates.
